indications.text:
1.1 Maintenance Treatment of COPD
STIOLTO RESPIMAT is a combination of tiotropium and olodaterol indicated for long-term, once-daily maintenance treatment of airflow obstruction in patients with
chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), including chronic bronchitis and/or emphysema.
Important Li...
